query:
-- audit_log: comment.create (resolved comment)
INSERT INTO audit_log (orgId, actorOpenId, actorName, action, targetType, targetId, diff, summary, createdAt)
VALUES (
  1,
  'HH9R8dErn8y8z3SgbFd7PD',
  'Los Silva',
  'comment.create',
  'comment',
  '1',
  '[{"field":"body","before":null,"after":"Reviewed 3 years of tax returns and P&L statements — financials are clean and consistent with the stated $450K SDE. Add-backs are well-documented. No red flags on the revenue side."},{"field":"dealId","before":null,"after":"demo-summit-hvac"}]',
  'Comment created on deal demo-summit-hvac',
  '2026-04-22 09:45:00'
);

-- audit_log: comment.resolve (resolved comment)
INSERT INTO audit_log (orgId, actorOpenId, actorName, action, targetType, targetId, diff, summary, createdAt)
VALUES (
  1,
  'HH9R8dErn8y8z3SgbFd7PD',
  'Los Silva',
  'comment.resolve',
  'comment',
  '1',
  '[{"field":"resolvedAt","before":null,"after":"2026-04-28T11:15:00.000Z"},{"field":"resolvedByOpenId","before":null,"after":"HH9R8dErn8y8z3SgbFd7PD"}]',
  'Comment resolved on deal demo-summit-hvac',
  '2026-04-28 11:15:00'
);

-- audit_log: comment.create (blocker comment)
INSERT INTO audit_log (orgId, actorOpenId, actorName, action, targetType, targetId, diff, summary, createdAt)
VALUES (
  1,
  'HH9R8dErn8y8z3SgbFd7PD',
  'Los Silva',
  'comment.create',
  'comment',
  '2',
  '[{"field":"body","before":null,"after":"**BLOCKER — Owner Dependency Risk**: Owner is the sole estimator..."},{"field":"dealId","before":null,"after":"demo-summit-hvac"}]',
  'Comment created on deal demo-summit-hvac',
  '2026-05-01 09:30:00'
);

-- audit_log: comment.set_blocker (blocker comment)
INSERT INTO audit_log (orgId, actorOpenId, actorName, action, targetType, targetId, diff, summary, createdAt)
VALUES (
  1,
  'HH9R8dErn8y8z3SgbFd7PD',
  'Los Silva',
  'comment.set_blocker',
  'comment',
  '2',
  '[{"field":"isBlocker","before":0,"after":1}]',
  'Comment flagged as blocker on deal demo-summit-hvac',
  '2026-05-01 09:31:00'
);

-- conflicts: declare a financial conflict
INSERT INTO conflicts (dealId, orgId, declarerOpenId, declarerName, conflictType, description, declaredAt, withdrawnAt, withdrawnByOpenId, withdrawnByName, withdrawnReason)
VALUES (
  'demo-summit-hvac',
  1,
  'HH9R8dErn8y8z3SgbFd7PD',
  'Los Silva',
  'financial',
  'I have a prior business relationship with the seller''s broker (Summit Capital Advisors). We co-invested in a separate deal in 2023. Disclosing for transparency — no financial interest in this specific transaction.',
  '2026-04-15 10:00:00',
  NULL,
  NULL,
  NULL,
  NULL
);
